body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: harness-enforced compaction cadence + Haiku dance
body.intention: I intend that the predicted side-effects of the compaction-cadence hook are observed and annotated before they bite silently.
body.description:
**What changed:** A Stop hook now injects /autocompact every 5 ticket-closes, and /autocompact compacts on Haiku then returns to Sonnet.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) compaction may fire mid-multi-step work if a close lands then the next turn is unrelated; (2) the Haiku dance may leave the session stuck on Haiku if the return-to-sonnet send-keys mis-sequences (compact is async); (3) sprint_tokens.log may receive lines from non-CC workers (DickSimnel) inflating CC's close counter and compacting too often; (4) baseline-update race could double-fire or never-fire.
**Signals to watch:** /compact appearing at odd points in the transcript; model still on Haiku after a compact; sprint_tokens.log lines whose trailing model field is not a CC sonnet/opus model; compact firing every turn (baseline broken).
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-19 or after the next 10+ ticket-close session, whichever comes first.
**Worst-case token spend:**
  - Per-failure cost: one spurious compaction = one Haiku summarization call (cheap — Haiku, standard context).
  - Hard cap: baseline=current after each fire prevents re-fire; if baseline logic breaks, worst case is one compact per Stop event (one per assistant turn).
  - Blast radius: a compact-loop every turn; halt by removing the Stop hook (ClaudeShim.stop()) or setting COMPACT_EVERY_N very high.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** no automated verification — observation ticket; done when predicted effects are annotated as occurred / clear / partial and ticket is closed
